sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try ACTION7 to see what it does
result = action(['ACTION7'])
print(f"ACTION7 result: {result}")
print(f"Level completed: {result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Done: {result.get('done')}")
print(f"Score: {result.get('score')}")

# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
green_blocks = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"Green blocks: {len(green_blocks)}")

# Check if anything changed
print(f"Board changed: {result.get('board_changed')}")
print(f"Gameplay changed: {result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
